creator: KevinTaylor15.44@gmail.com
text:
Some of the others seem a bit extreme and I suspect tuning them back would be reasonable. The queue depths are being set to the maximum possible. I suspect 4096 and 1024 would be adequate.

Not really sure why the reduction of maximum AIO processes to 4, but does not seem unreasonable. Likewise the 10x increase in idle time for AIO processes. https://www.quickpayportal.website/
